description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the continuumio/anaconda3 Docker image and runs a before_script step printing the Python version with python -V. Define a single job named run in the default test stage that executes the shell commands: pip install redis, python setup.py bdist_wheel, pip install dist/*, pip list, and pytest. Configure the run job to upload the generated wheel files matching dist/*.whl as artifacts. No services, caches, or special rules are required.
